  "findings": [
    "Turn-of-nut match marks are absent or have not been rotated to verify tensioning."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reject the connection in its current state.",
    "Require the contractor to apply match marks and perform the required rotation, or verify tension using an approved pre-installation verification method."
  ],
  "rationale": "Under the RCSC Specification, when the turn-of-nut method is specified for pretensioned joints, match-marking of the nut and bolt tip is required to visually verify that the correct rotation has been achieved. The absence of these marks or lack of rotation indicates the bolts are not properly pretensioned.",
  "references": [
    "RCSC Specification Section 8.2.1"
  ]
}
